queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of negative checking account balances to increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of the absence of a checking account on the likelihood of loan default.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: no credits taken or all previous credits paid back duly.
queries.question: Investigation into how a lack of credit history or fully settled past credits contributes to elevated credit risk profiles.
